first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (3/10), and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions correctly identify the same critical gaps in the candidate's profile: insufficient C++ experience, lack of required database skills (SQL Server/Oracle), and no relevant domain experience in capital markets. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the university attended.
